commit.subject: ビルド、lint修正
commit.author: sakastudio
commit.refs: HEAD -> master, tag: v0.0.16, origin/master, origin/HEAD

entries.label: - Added schema-driven GUID de-duplication before TableView p…

commit.subject: - Added schema-driven GUID de-duplication before TableView pastes so new rows regenerate conflicting `autoGenerated` UUIDs and report the count in the success toast (`apps/mooreseditor/src/components/TableView/hooks/useClipboardAppend.ts:35` and helper `apps/mooreseditor/src/utils/ensureUniqueAutoGeneratedUuids.ts:19`). - When replacing an existing row via clipboard the same GUID safeguards now run against sibling rows, again surfacing the regeneration notice (`apps/mooreseditor/src/components/TableView/components/RowCopyPasteButtons.tsx:41`). - Let copy/paste handlers return optional feedback so the toast can mention regenerated GUIDs, and added focused unit coverage for the new utility (`apps/mooreseditor/src/hooks/useCopyPaste.ts:8`, `apps/mooreseditor/src/utils/ensureUniqueAutoGeneratedUuids.test.ts:1`).
